why: Protocol 775 Play clientbound official packet table assigns minecraft:chunk_batch_finished to packet id 0x0b, and the official ClientboundChunkBatchFinishedPacket(int) fixture encodes a context-free body as batchSize via FriendlyByteBuf VarInt. Stevenarella must expose a packet variant, dispatch that official id, decode the official body, and fully consume the bytes for packet-support evidence.
what: The exact Rust oracle test failed to compile because steven_protocol::protocol::packet::Packet has no PlayChunkBatchFinishedClientbound variant, so Stevenarella cannot currently dispatch the official Play clientbound chunk_batch_finished packet id/body.

evidence.observed_failure: error[E0599]: no variant or associated item named `PlayChunkBatchFinishedClientbound` found for enum `Packet`
